accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies purpose as imposing sanctions on CCP officials and fentanyl-related enterprises.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Describes the sanctions mechanism under IEEPA and INA.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes UN HQ Agreement exception, intelligence/law enforcement exception, and goods importation exception.

effective_dates.why: Notes 30-day implementation deadline and 2-year waiver authority expiration.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all major provisions including who is sanctioned, sanctions types, exceptions, waiver, and penalties.

correct_entities.why: IEEPA, INA, and relevant committees correctly named.

correct_figures.why: 30-day, 60-day, 15-day figures and 2-year authority expiration correctly stated.
